title: Diagnose complex faults in heavy vehicle diesel engines
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose complex faults in heavy vehicle diesel engines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and confirm the work requirement

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm nature of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm nature of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm nature of fault according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and confirm the work requirement

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose complex faults

pcs.text: Identify required information for diagnosis activity2.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy, including, diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes2.3 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for diagnosis activity2.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy, including, diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes2.3 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for diagnosis activity2.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy, including, diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes2.3 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare to diagnose complex faults

elements.title: Apply diagnostic procedures

pcs.text: Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements3.2 Verify and report diagnostic findings using reliable alternative process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures3.4 Communicate findings to workplace supervisor and customer and confirm next steps
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements3.2 Verify and report diagnostic findings using reliable alternative process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures3.4 Communicate findings to workplace supervisor and customer and confirm next steps?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements3.2 Verify and report diagnostic findings using reliable alternative process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures3.4 Communicate findings to workplace supervisor and customer and confirm next steps.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply diagnostic procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for repair process or return to customer 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for repair process or return to customer 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for repair process or return to customer 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
